title: routerd CloudEdge Federation Qualification evidence
description: Machine-readable evidence emitted by cloudedge-federation-qualification.sh. One file per scenario per cycle, validated by this schema.

runId.description: Run identifier from the qualification harness.

commit.description: Git commit (or HEAD sha) of the routerd build under test.

scenario.description: Scenario name from the qualification matrix.

reason.description: Required for fail/skip results — why the scenario did not pass.

startedAt.description: UTC timestamp when the scenario started.

endedAt.description: UTC timestamp when the scenario completed.

testedEventId.description: Primary test event ID emitted during the scenario.

doctorBefore.description: routerctl doctor federation JSON snapshot before the scenario.

doctorDuring.description: routerctl doctor federation JSON snapshot during fault injection.

doctorAfter.description: routerctl doctor federation JSON snapshot after the scenario.

deliverySummary.description: routerctl federation deliveries summary JSON after the scenario.

doctorJson.description: Full doctor JSON for scenarios that only read doctor state.

recoveryDurationSeconds.description: Time in seconds for partition/fault recovery.

malformedStatus.description: HTTP status from malformed body security test.

wrongStatus.description: HTTP status from wrong-structure security test.

badAuthStatus.description: HTTP status from bad-auth security test.

eventCountBefore.description: Event list count before security test.

eventCountAfter.description: Event list count after security test.

foundCodes.description: Doctor check codes found in config-fault scenario.

expectedAction.description: Remediation actions found in config-fault scenario.

subscriptionRunsDuring.description: Subscription run JSON during plugin failure.

subscriptionRunsAfter.description: Subscription run JSON after plugin restore.
